# ChatBot24 Studio - LLM Access Rules

## Allowed
- / - Main page
- /blog.html - Blog index
- /blog/*.html - Blog articles
- /privacy-policy.html - Privacy policy

## Disallowed
- /api/* - API endpoints

## Description
ChatBot24 Studio develops custom chatbots for business automation,
CRM integration, and lead qualification. Primary language: Russian.
Contact: info@ChatBot24.su
